actor_free.rule: Only emotion tags + intensity + beat title. No muscle/face choreography. Camera and light still present as production frame but performance is open.

director_guided.rule: Full trinity: physical performance + shot size + camera move (catalog prompt) + lighting for emotion + dialogue delivery. No literary metaphor. No exact mm/degree numbers in performance text.

quality: Both versions share same shot_id, duration, and story beat
Director-guided must not invent plot beyond FilmBible
Actor-free must not list contradictory emotions
